shared_attributes.rendering: top layer, above all game elements

context.game: Pico Echo - virtual pet cockatiel game
context.role: Displays Echo's current need via icon (hungry = seed, sleeping = ZZZ)
context.usage_scenario: Appears when Echo is hungry (shows seed icon) or sleeping (shows ZZZ). Disappears when need is met. Helps player understand Echo's state.

visual_specification.shape: Rounded rectangle speech bubble with small tail pointing to Echo

animation.description: 2 variants: seed icon (hungry state) and ZZZ text (sleeping state). No animation, instant appear/disappear.

visual_specification.details: Bubble: 12px wide, 10px tall, cream background (#FFF1E8), 1px black outline. Tail: 2px triangle pointing toward Echo. Icon variants: Seed (3x3px #FFA300 oval) or ZZZ (3x3px text #7E2553). Positioned above-right of Echo at approximately (80, 45). Only one bubble visible at a time.

relationships.differences_from: care_menu: system-triggered vs player-triggered, single icon vs 3 buttons, temporary vs toggle. Smaller than care menu.

explicit_negations: Bubble does not float or bob
No thought bubble style (speech bubble only)
Does not follow Echo if Echo moves
